summary: RE-AUDIT of Chapter 22 revision v2 — PASSED. All four previous automatic fail triggers have been resolved: (1) LINE-201 negation-contrast saturation reduced from 26+ to 10-11 strict instances within the 10-12 target, with only 1 instance in the final 20 lines; (2) LINE-205 near-verbatim grip passage reuse eliminated — first passage completely rewritten with different physical detail; (3) INV-014 traceability chain fully restored with correct finding IDs throughout; (4) INV-081 all four darlings cut and replaced with stronger alternatives. Additionally all copy-edit fixes applied: 'divine corpse' → 'the divine remains,' 'Serath Dún' → 'Serath Dûn,' 'Seventh Seat' → 'Sixth Seat,' all British spellings → American English, 'electric' anachronism removed. Conclave section tightened by ~287 words (exceeding the 100-150 word target). No new critical or major regressions introduced. Two minor warnings noted for polish pass (L65/L125 near-echo, L79 'catalogue' spelling). Chapter is ready to proceed to beta reading.
